name: GG Tanks
short_description: A game to show your friends that, inside a tank, you are the best in arena battles.
detailed_description:
Get ready for the most insane and explosive battle you've ever seen! 🚀💥

Step into chaotic arenas and face up to 8 players in intense tank battles!

Here, strategy and speed are everything, as you accelerate, drift and use your skills to send your enemies off the map. 🌍➡️🕳️

With controls that are easy to learn but challenging to master, each match is pure adrenaline and fun. Do you have what it takes to survive and dominate this explosive combat to become the true king of the arena?

🌟 Main Features:

⚔️ PvP action for up to 8 players.

🌎 Dynamic arenas full of dangers and strategies.

🔥 Fast-paced, adrenaline-fueled matches!

🚩 It's either victory or defeat. What will be your fate?

Add to your wishlist and show off your power in the arena! 🎮

Hi, I'm a solo developer. If you encounter any bugs or have ideas for the game, feel free to send me an email. Help in the development of the game. Thank you!
